infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: PulseAI reads your health data to display heart rate, activity, sleep, and workout metrics from your Apple Watch and Health app.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: PulseAI does not write health data.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Used to connect to your WHOOP or Garmin watch for live heart rate data.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Used to connect to your WHOOP or Garmin watch for live heart rate data.
